mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hot (target_type, target_id, prev_hot_score, play_count_24h, collect_count_24h, comment_count_24h, play_count_7d, collect_count_7d, comment_count_7d, hot_score) VALUES
(#{item.targetType}, #{item.targetId}, #{item.prevHotScore}, #{item.playCount24h}, #{item.collectCount24h}, #{item.commentCount24h}, #{item.playCount7d}, #{item.collectCount7d}, #{item.commentCount7d}, #{item.hotScore})
ON CONFLICT (target_type, target_id) DO UPDATE SET prev_hot_score = EXCLUDED.prev_hot_score, play_count_24h = EXCLUDED.play_count_24h, collect_count_24h = EXCLUDED.collect_count_24h, comment_count_24h = EXCLUDED.comment_count_24h, play_count_7d = EXCLUDED.play_count_7d, collect_count_7d = EXCLUDED.collect_count_7d, comment_count_7d = EXCLUDED.comment_count_7d, hot_score = EXCLUDED.hot_score
